name: Pat Gelsinger
title: Former CEO of Intel & VMware
bio: American business executive and engineer who served as CEO of Intel (2021-2024) and previously as CEO of VMware. Was the chief architect of Intel's i486 microprocessor and the youngest person named VP at Intel at age 32.
faith: Raised in an Amish/Mennonite community in Pennsylvania, Gelsinger is an outspoken Christian who has given his testimony at numerous churches and conferences. He has spoken about balancing career ambition with faith and family, tithing generously, and how his faith shapes his leadership.

videos.title: We Were Not Sure About Your Christianity - Pat Gelsinger
videos.note: Former Intel CEO shares journey of faith, calling, and leadership

sources.title: Pat Gelsinger — From Farm Boy to Tech CEO
sources.note: His testimony about growing up Amish/Mennonite and leading in tech

tagline: Led Intel and VMware while keeping Christ at the center
